notes: DigitalTQ community sample: 371 packs. Measured per-pack rates: V 15.9%, VSTAR 3.77%, VMAX 2.16%, ultra rare 5.39%, rainbow 3.23%, secret gold 0.54%, radiant 5.39%, rare holo 70.35% (sum with hits ~101%, consistent with a guaranteed holo-or-better rare slot). Rare slot residual on rare-holo (set has no plain non-holo rares per pokemontcg.io). Radiant placed in the reverse slot, residual filler 50/50 common/uncommon. packSize excludes energy/VSTAR marker and code card. No booster display ever existed (special set); ETB holds 10 packs.
